## Test plan

<!--
Checklist of how you validated the change. For bug fixes, include the exact
command or steps that used to fail and now pass.
-->

- [ ] `make pre-commit` passes locally
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes locally
- [ ] Added / updated unit tests where behavior changed
- [ ] Manually exercised the relevant CLI / TUI flow
- [ ] Updated user-facing docs (`docs/COMMANDS.md`, `README.md`, etc.) if applicable
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
